feature.intent: Implement recommended workflow phase skill bindings over existing skills with shared resolution, dependency manifests, runtime prompt emphasis, and bounded evidence.

adaptiveExecution.degradationReason: Native multi-agent tools were visible, but current policy permits spawning only when the user explicitly asks for delegation. The user invoked $sp-plan only, so lanes were compiled inline.

mustPreserve.obligation: Real recommended bindings, not prompt-only guidance.
Recommended skills, shared catalog, import/export, prompt emphasis, and evidence remain in scope.
No auto-execution or default completion block.
Workflow phases bind to skills, not plugins.
Names-first references with qualified metadata only when needed.
Active prompt emphasis without mandatory invocation.
Bounded soft audit for used or relevant skipped/unavailable skills only.
Dependency manifest on export; no default bundle.
Missing recommended skills import with warnings and preserved references.
SkillTool safety and permission boundaries remain authoritative.
Explicit bundle mode remains future scope.
Schema, resolver boundary, and evidence storage resolved without changing product semantics.

consequenceObligations.decision: Use WorkflowPhaseSkillReference, WorkflowPhaseSkillResolution, and dependency manifest entries for stable identity.
Render a distinct recommended skills prompt block from session snapshot.
Use shared resolver status vocabulary across validation, import/export, runtime, and UI.
Keep skill-derived capability effects behind SkillTool.
Snapshot phase skill resolutions/provenance for running and resumed sessions.
Validate reference shape and resolver diagnostics without blocking missing recommendations.
Desktop surfaces show source, availability, and plugin provenance concisely.
Carry snapshot/evidence through resume, compaction, and final reports.

stopConditions: Implementation makes recommended skills default completion gates.
Implementation binds workflow phases to plugins as primary objects.
Implementation bundles skill package contents by default.
Implementation grants tools, shell, hooks, model, effort, or fork behavior outside SkillTool.

planArtifactValidation: JSON parse for plan-contract and handoffs
